package rulecoverage

func NegativeAuditLoggingExecutedInHandlerBeforeServiceSuccess() string {
    ruleID := "audit_logging_executed_in_handler_before_service_success"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Audit writes that happen before the service has confirmed success."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
